name: Liberty Bank of New Jersey
description_short: Liberty University is a Christian educational institution in Virginia offering residential, online, and K-12 programs—not a bank or financial services lender.
description_long: Liberty University is a private Christian university headquartered in Lynchburg, Virginia, founded with a mission to train 'Champions for Christ.' The institution operates multiple educational divisions including residential undergraduate and graduate programs, an extensive online learning platform with over 600 programs, specialized schools (Law, Divinity, Osteopathic Medicine), and Liberty Online Academy for K-12 homeschool students. The university serves tens of thousands of students globally through various educational pathways and has grown to operate one of the largest online education programs in the United States. The university offers a comprehensive range of educational services across multiple degree levels and delivery formats. Students can pursue associate, bachelor's, master's, and doctoral degrees either on the residential Lynchburg campus or through online platforms. Specific offerings include undergraduate and graduate admissions, residential campus housing, online course delivery via Canvas and Blackboard, financial aid processing, library research services, tutoring through Tutor.com, athletic programs including Division I sports, and student life activities. The institution also provides K-12 online education through Liberty Online Academy, which recently exceeded 20,000 students. Liberty University distinguishes itself through its explicit Christian mission and values-based education model, particularly its 'Faith Inspires Academic Excellence' brand positioning. The university operates one of the largest residential Christian campuses in America with significant athletic programs, maintains extensive online educational infrastructure serving global learners, and integrates faith-based curriculum throughout its programs. The institution also operates specialized professional schools and maintains active community engagement initiatives. This company profile contains a critical miscategorization error: Liberty University is an educational institution with no consumer financial services, lending products, or banking operations. It does not offer personal loans, emergency cash advances, credit repair, or any financial products to consumers. The current categorization as 'personal-loans' is factually incorrect and misleading. Any consumer seeking financial services should not contact this institution, as it provides exclusively educational services.

diagnosis: Liberty University is an educational institution, not a financial services provider. This profile should be removed from CreditDoc immediately as it serves no consumer finance function and the current categorization is factually incorrect and misleading to consumers seeking personal loans or banking services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
